sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 14

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 14:1
items.html:
(to the question) Ben [son]
Every lower one is discerned as a son of its upper one — that is, in that respect in which it is caused by it. (p. 734, Item 3).
